architecture.summary: Next.js 15 SSR, reuse existing server components (CategoryNav, TrendingSkills), extract shared VideoPlayer with lazy-load default, new /studio route, homepage rewrite from 300 to ~100 lines

integrations.summary: N/A - no new external services, all data from existing KV/hardcoded arrays

ui-ux.summary: Search-first homepage with auto-focus on non-touch, compact agent strip from hardcoded arrays, /studio page with video+features+getting-started, nav restructure adding Studio removing Queue/Submit from primary

performance.summary: VideoPlayer lazy-loads by default via IntersectionObserver, eager prop opt-in, existing force-dynamic SSR preserved

security.summary: N/A - purely frontend changes, no auth or data handling changes

edge-cases.summary: Auto-focus only on hover:hover devices, dead code deletion with git as rollback, JSON-LD SearchAction for SEO compensation
